notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice lines out to left fielder Angel Martínez. Throwing error by left fielder Angel Martínez.

notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins plunked
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins hit by pitch. Chase DeLauter to 3rd. Kyle Manzardo to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Angel Martínez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Angel Martínez grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Kyle Manzardo out at 2nd. Angel Martínez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Trent Grisham.
